hero.tagline: Focused mobile apps, crafted in Canada.

presencetracker.name: PresenceTracker
presencetracker.desc: PresenceTracker helps permanent residents and citizenship applicants stay on top of Canada's physical presence requirements. Log your absences abroad and the app calculates your days in Canada in real time.

explainer.title: Physical presence, explained
explainer.p1: To become a Canadian citizen, permanent residents generally need to have been physically present in Canada for at least 1,095 days (3 years) within the 5 years immediately before applying. Permanent residents also need to meet a separate residency obligation — at least 730 days (2 years) of physical presence within any 5-year period — whether they're renewing their PR card or applying for a new one.
explainer.p2: Both counts only look at time actually spent inside Canada — every trip abroad, even a short one, subtracts from the total. Tracking this by hand across years of travel is exactly the kind of tedious, error-prone bookkeeping PresenceTracker was built to remove: log your trips once, and it keeps a running, accurate count of your physical presence days for citizenship or PR applications. A coming update adds PDF and CSV export, so you can print your data or manage it outside the app.
explainer.p3: This isn't legal advice — always confirm your specific situation with IRCC or an immigration professional — but it's the number every applicant needs to get right.

whychoose.label: Why Choose Us
whychoose.title: Mobile expertise, without the agency overhead
whychoose.text:
We bring cross-platform mobile development expertise to every product we ship — built with the same stack used by major tech companies, with the attention to detail of a boutique studio.

No bloated agencies, no account managers between you and the developer. You work directly with the people building your app, which means faster decisions, cleaner results, and software that actually fits your problem.

Every project starts with listening. We learn your domain, your users, and your constraints before writing a single line of code. The result is focused, reliable software — not a feature list.
whychoose.reason1Text: React Native and Expo let us ship to iOS and Android from a single codebase — with native performance and feel on both platforms.
whychoose.reason2Text: No analytics, no cloud sync, no tracking. Every app keeps your data on your device, by default.
whychoose.reason3Text: A small Canadian studio with no middlemen, no quarterly targets. Every decision is driven by quality, not growth metrics.

team.label: The Studio
team.title: Small team. Strong focus.
team.text:
Application Development Canada is a small independent mobile studio based in Canada. We build focused tools that solve real problems for real people — carefully crafted for iOS and Android, with no bloat, no subscriptions, and no tracking.

Every decision, from architecture to design, is driven by one goal: software that works reliably and treats users with respect.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.summaryText: PresenceTracker stores all your data locally on your device only. We collect no personal information, use no analytics, and send no data to any server.
privacy.collectText: PresenceTracker does not collect, transmit, or store any personal information on external servers. All data you enter in the app — including trip dates, countries, and settings — is stored exclusively in a local SQLite database on your device.
privacy.storageText: Your trip history and app preferences are stored locally using SQLite on-device storage via Expo's SQLite library. This data never leaves your device unless you explicitly export it.
storageItems: App settings (language, color scheme, PR approval date)
privacy.storageNote: We do not have access to this data, and it is not backed up to any Application Development Canada server.
privacy.thirdPartyText: PresenceTracker does not use any third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking SDKs. We do not integrate with any social platforms or share data with any external parties.
privacy.permissionsText: The app does not request access to your camera, microphone, contacts, location, or any other device sensors. The only permission used is local storage for saving your trip data.
privacy.childrenText: PresenceTracker is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect any information from children.
privacy.changesText: If we make changes to this privacy policy, we will update the "Last updated" date above. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this privacy policy, you can reach us at
